evals.prompt: Can you do a Q2 FY26 delivery review for the slide deck I need to present to leadership? Cover all the usual Sonos projects.
evals.expected_output: Slide-ready 2-sentence summaries for all 10 projects (ECRM, CareDev, HWOF, SBIZ, CRMPTNR, MET, WEBPLAT, WEBTECH, SUB, PWM) based on actual completed Jira issues from Jan–Mar 2026.

evals.prompt: What did the CRMPTNR and WEBTECH teams ship in Q2 FY26?
evals.expected_output: 2-sentence impact summaries for CRMPTNR and WEBTECH only, grounded in completed Jira issues from Jan–Mar 2026.

evals.prompt: I need to prep for the Q3 FY26 quarterly review — what can I say was delivered this quarter for the Sonos IT portfolio?
evals.expected_output: Slide-ready 2-sentence summaries for all 10 projects based on completed Jira issues from Apr–Jun 2026.
